title: Better Snow Coverage
description: Renders missing snow under various blocks [Client Side Only]
body:
![Better Snow Coverage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eb8f1959d329d4398c6e69976ab4d70b74e6c5d.png)

![sodium](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ToBinio/dense-flowers/refs/heads/main/assets/Requires_Sodium_cosy.svg)
![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_vector.svg)

A Fabric mod that shows a snow layer underneath blocks that have a few snow layers touching them.

This mod does not need to be run server-side so that you can enjoy snow everywhere.

![mod preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9f9c1df5ac9b710584572f281083dd13ab5d01e.gif)
